2292080.name: Dreamscape Runners
2292080.description:
Zoom through short fast-paced chaotic levels filled with branching paths, and various obstacles to get to the end! Use various power-ups to either transverse the level quicker or in a different way - some of which can be used to slow the other player or to get rid of enemies. Go up against a friend in local co-op or play against yourself to get a new high score! Prove yourself to be the best dreamscape runner!

Features:

- 6 fast-paced chaotic levels to race through.
- Find and use 6 different unique power-ups to change the flow of the race.
- Local 2-Player Multiplayer (Player 1 uses keyboard and mouse, while player 2 uses controller)
- Best times on each level
2292080.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
